summary: Replaced stale token-setting guidance with OAuth login-first setup and clearer Google credential messaging.
reason: The regenerated CLI still referenced a nonexistent `auth set-token` command and API-key wording even though this CLI authenticates through Google OAuth login or an optional short-lived access token env var.
validated_outcome: `go build` succeeded; `auth setup` now prints the Google Cloud credentials URL and `doctor --json` reports login-based auth guidance with GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_OAUTH2.
